docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARKHIPOV, VICTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOREIN, RACHEL $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,085.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR NOV-21-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
STIPULATION AND ORDER TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY MOREIN, RACHEL ARKHIPOV, VICTOR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY ARKHIPOV, VICTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MOREIN, RACHEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF RACHEL MOREIN FILED BY DEFENDANT MOREIN, RACHEL
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF NOV-21-2012 - JUDGMENT ENTERED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $35.00. SERVED SEP-04-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MOREIN, RACHEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-28-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-28-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY HEDA BOSCOE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT MOREIN, RACHEL MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ARKHIPOV, VICTOR

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF NOV-21-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-21-2012 BY JEFFREY WOHL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. EXHIBITS INTRODUCED AND RETURNED. CLERK: BPAREDES. NOT REPORTED. DEPT 525.
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARKHIPOV, VICTOR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT MOREIN, RACHEL TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT ARKHIPOV, VICTOR JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF DEFT/APPELLANT RACHEL MOREIN AGAINST PLATF/RESPONDENT VICTOR ARKHIPOV; TOTAL JUDGMENT IS ZERO. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2012 - JUDGMENT.
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (NO EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
